status: STUB — server requires auth (401 without SMOKE_SESSION_COOKIE) in W7-R3 session
note: Run manually after exporting SMOKE_SESSION_COOKIE (from browser DevTools __session cookie) and SMOKE_CHART_ID (SELECT id FROM charts LIMIT 1): python3 platform/scripts/eval/runner.py --planner-off --base-url http://localhost:3000 --output 00_ARCHITECTURE/EVAL/BASELINE_RUN_W7.json. The harness was probed against http://localhost:3000/api/chat/consume which returned HTTP 401, confirming the server is up but requires Firebase auth that the eval session cannot mint headlessly. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to enable the Haiku synthesis judge; without it synthesis_score returns 0.5 for all fixtures with a logged warning per scorer.py.
